disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: VIDEO: Study finds high prevalence of hantavirus in some areas of PNW - KIRO 7 News Seattle
updates.body_en: VIDEO: Study finds high prevalence of hantavirus in some areas of PNW KIRO 7 News Seattle
updates.summary_zh: 研究发现美国太平洋西北部分地区汉坦病毒高流行。

updates.title_en: Polish captain of hantavirus-hit ship to return home after negative tests - TVP World
updates.body_en: Polish captain of hantavirus-hit ship to return home after negative tests TVP World
updates.summary_zh: 受汉坦病毒影响船舶的波兰船长检测阴性后回国。

updates.title_en: Acting NIAID Chief Steps Down Amid Ebola, Hantavirus Concerns - U.S. News & World Report
updates.body_en: Acting NIAID Chief Steps Down Amid Ebola, Hantavirus Concerns U.S. News & World Report
updates.summary_zh: 美国NIAID代理主任因埃博拉和汉坦病毒担忧辞职。

updates.title_en: WHO says 12th person infected with hantavirus detected in the Netherlands - Al Jazeera
updates.body_en: WHO says 12th person infected with hantavirus detected in the Netherlands Al Jazeera
updates.summary_zh: WHO称荷兰发现第12例汉坦病毒感染者。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus: Final 14 days of home quarantine for negative cases - Euronews.com
updates.body_en: Hantavirus: Final 14 days of home quarantine for negative cases Euronews.com
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒阴性病例需完成最后14天居家隔离。

updates.title_en: Dutch cruise ship crew member tests positive for Hantavirus in isolation - The Telegraph
updates.body_en: Dutch cruise ship crew member tests positive for Hantavirus in isolation The Telegraph
updates.summary_zh: 荷兰邮轮一名船员汉坦病毒检测阳性，已隔离。

updates.title_en: FULL BRIEFING: Officials share latest on cruise ship hantavirus quarantine in Omaha - WOWT
updates.body_en: FULL BRIEFING: Officials share latest on cruise ship hantavirus quarantine in Omaha WOWT
updates.summary_zh: 官员通报奥马哈邮轮汉坦病毒隔离最新情况。

updates.title_en: Canada’s top doctor set to give an update on both Ebola and hantavirus today - Toronto Star
updates.body_en: Canada’s top doctor set to give an update on both Ebola and hantavirus today Toronto Star
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大首席医生将就埃博拉和汉坦病毒更新情况。

updates.title_en: Risk low, but Niagara officials keep watch as hantavirus cases reach Canada - St. Catharines Standard
updates.body_en: Risk low, but Niagara officials keep watch as hantavirus cases reach Canada St. Catharines Standard
updates.summary_zh: 尼亚加拉官员称汉坦病毒传入加拿大，风险低。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship rise to 12 after crew member tests positive - NBC News
updates.body_en: Hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship rise to 12 after crew member tests positive NBC News
updates.summary_zh: 邮轮相关汉坦病毒病例升至12例，一名船员阳性。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus update: Nebraska officials awaiting CDC guidance on passengers’ release - WOWT
updates.body_en: Hantavirus update: Nebraska officials awaiting CDC guidance on passengers’ release WOWT
updates.summary_zh: 内布拉斯加州等待美国CDC指导乘客解除隔离。

updates.title_en: WHO chief says hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship rise to 12 - Anadolu Ajansı
updates.body_en: WHO chief says hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship rise to 12 Anadolu Ajansı
updates.summary_zh: WHO称邮轮相关汉坦病毒病例升至12例。

updates.title_en: WHO urges ongoing monitoring of hantavirus after new case - Devdiscourse
updates.body_en: WHO urges ongoing monitoring of hantavirus after new case Devdiscourse
updates.summary_zh: WHO 呼吁持续监测汉坦病毒。

updates.title_en: WHO Health Emergencies EPI-WIN webinar: Hantavirus in Focus II: hantavirus natural history, infection control and clinical management of patients in hospital - World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.body_en: WHO Health Emergencies EPI-WIN webinar: Hantavirus in Focus II: hantavirus natural history, infection control and clinical management of patients in hospital World Health Organization (WHO)

updates.body_en: Inside an African lab that helped crack the hantavirus outbreak Reuters
updates.summary_zh: 非洲实验室协助破解汉坦病毒疫情。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus exposure risk may be higher than believed in parts of US, study finds - Fox News
updates.body_en: Hantavirus exposure risk may be higher than believed in parts of US, study finds Fox News Study finds deadly hantavirus more widespread in Pacific Northwest rodents than expected KOMO Hantavirus risk from rodents may be higher in Pacific Northwest USA Today
updates.summary_zh: 研究称美国部分地区汉坦病毒暴露风险更高。

updates.body_en: Public health in action: from detection to response – how International Health Regulations (2005) guided response to hantavirus outbreak World Health Organization (WHO)
